---
title: time-naming
description: "Avoid unit suffixes on time.Duration values."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Avoid unit suffixes on time.Duration values. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
var timeoutSeconds time.Duration
```

## Good

```go
var timeout time.Duration
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only time-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
